title: Complex
documentation:
## Purpose
The [Complex](https://capdag.com/browse/media:complex;numeric;textable) type represents a single complex number (with real and imaginary parts) encoded as UTF-8 text.

## When to use
Use this type when a node produces or consumes complex-valued scalars — for example, outputs from FFT analysis, signal processing nodes, or quantum computing simulations.

## Notes
The canonical text representation is `a+bj` (Python-style) or `a+bi`, where `a` is the real part and `b` is the imaginary part. Implementers should document the exact notation convention at the port. For sequences of complex values, use `media:complex;list;numeric;textable`.
